evals.prompt: 帮我准备一下和弘晖资本的投资人会议
evals.expected_output: Uses FundFlow first, identifies current stage and objective, researches investor style if needed, and produces an internal prep note with likely questions and next actions.

evals.prompt: 今天国新基金会议在融管通里，读一下会议听记，分析关键点并发到融资支持群
evals.expected_output: Uses FundFlow meeting detail/transcript first, separates transcript facts from inference, analyzes investor questions/style/follow-up, sends a verified DingTalk group update only after checking command schema.

evals.prompt: 投资人提到奇点智源和知满科技，帮我分析他们真正关心什么，并给出后续跟进口径
evals.expected_output: Researches public current sources, classifies the investor's implicit concerns, connects the comparison back to Friday/Stardust positioning, and avoids claiming unsupported transcript facts.
